tokens.name: --font-mono
tokens.value: "JetBrains Mono", "JetBrains Mono NL", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace

classes.name: action-icon
classes.rule: display: block; flex: 0 0 auto; height: 20px; width: 20px;

classes.name: active-dot
classes.rule: background: var(--text); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--text) 10%, transparent); width: 34px;

classes.name: adapter-list
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 10px; padding-left: 0; list-style: none;

classes.name: bar
classes.rule: background: var(--card-bg-subtle); border-radius: 999px; height: 10px; margin-top: 18px; overflow: hidden; position: relative;

classes.name: brand
classes.rule: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-weight: 800;

classes.name: brand-mark
classes.rule: align-items: center; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 999px; color: var(--accent-text); display: inline-flex; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 900; height: 34px; justify-content: center; width: 34px;

classes.name: brand-row
classes.rule: align-items: center; display: flex; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase;

classes.name: capability-icon
classes.rule: fill: none; height: 18px; stroke: currentColor; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 1.8; width: 18px;

classes.name: conversion-shell
classes.rule: min-height: 100vh; background: #f7f8fb; color: #15161a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; padding: 32px;

classes.name: docs-peers
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 8px; padding-left: 0; list-style: none;

classes.name: docs-shell
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 0.75fr) minmax(0, 1.25fr); gap: 14px;

classes.name: dx-action
classes.rule: display: inline-grid; place-items: center; background: hsl(var(--foreground)); color: hsl(var(--background));

classes.name: dx-action-icon
classes.rule: fill: currentColor; transform-origin: center; transition: transform 180ms ease;

classes.name: dx-card
classes.rule: width: min(100%, 76rem); border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--card)); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 hsl(var(--foreground) / 0.04) inset; padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);

classes.name: dx-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(18rem, 100%), 1fr)); gap: 1rem;

classes.name: dx-landing
classes.rule: background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--page-bg) 0%, var(--page-bg-soft) 46%, var(--page-bg) 100%); color: var(--text); font-family: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, "SFMono-Regular", Consolas, "Liberation Mono", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; height: 100dvh; min-height: 100vh; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: auto; padding-bottom: 0; position: relative; scrollbar-gutter: stable; touch-action: pan-y; overscroll-behavior-y: contain; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; scroll-behavior: smooth; transition: background-color 220ms ease, color 220ms ease;

classes.name: dx-launch
classes.rule: width: min(1180px, calc(100vw - 32px)); margin: 0 auto; padding: 32px 0 72px;

classes.name: dx-scrollbar
classes.rule: background: var(--scroll-track); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; bottom: 24px; cursor: pointer; padding: 2px; position: fixed; right: max(4px, env(safe-area-inset-right)); top: 24px; width: 20px; z-index: 2147483647;

classes.name: dx-secondary-action
classes.rule: min-height: 2.65rem; border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); padding: 0.7rem 1rem; font: inherit; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.16s, border-color 0.16s, background 0.16s;

classes.name: dx-shell
classes.rule: min-height: 100vh; display: grid; place-items: center; padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 3rem);

classes.name: dx-table
classes.rule: border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 30px; overflow: hidden; width: 100%;

classes.name: editor-rail
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; padding: 16px;

classes.name: editor-shell
classes.rule: background: var(--card-bg-subtle); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft); display: grid; gap: 14px; grid-template-columns: 160px minmax(0, 1fr) 180px; margin: 34px 0; min-height: 430px; overflow: hidden; padding: 14px;

classes.name: editor-stage
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 18px; min-width: 0;

classes.name: eyebrow
classes.rule: color: #6d7280; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0; margin: 0; text-transform: uppercase;

classes.name: feature-banner
classes.rule: align-items: stretch; background: var(--card-bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft); display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 0.42fr) minmax(0, 0.58fr); min-height: 260px; overflow: hidden;

classes.name: footer-callout
classes.rule: align-items: flex-start; background: var(--card-bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: space-between; margin: 28px 0 0; padding: 22px;

classes.name: footer-link-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 24px; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); padding: 36px 0;

classes.name: footer-mega
classes.rule: height: clamp(156px, 20vw, 292px); margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw); margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw); overflow: hidden; padding: clamp(28px, 5vw, 64px) 0 0;

classes.name: footer-status-strip
classes.rule: border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; justify-content: space-between; padding: 18px 0;

classes.name: footer-theme-row
classes.rule: align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; gap: 18px; justify-content: space-between; padding: 28px 0;

classes.name: footer-topline
classes.rule: align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; gap: 18px; justify-content: space-between; padding-bottom: 28px;

classes.name: hero
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(320px, 440px); gap: 28px; align-items: stretch;

classes.name: hero-actions
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; justify-content: center; margin-top: 32px;

classes.name: hero-image-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 14px; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); margin-top: 34px; width: 100%;

classes.name: hero-video-carousel
classes.rule: border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); margin: 0 auto clamp(32px, 5vw, 62px); max-width: 1080px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; width: 100%;

classes.name: inline-stack
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; align-items: center;

classes.name: is-active
classes.rule: transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: rgba(25, 244, 138, 0.85); background: rgba(25, 244, 138, 0.12);

classes.name: is-current
classes.rule: transform: translateX(4px); border-color: rgba(25, 244, 138, 0.75); background: rgba(25, 244, 138, 0.1);

classes.name: landing-cta
classes.rule: align-items: center; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft); display: flex; flex-direction: column; margin-top: 42px; text-align: center;

classes.name: landing-hero
classes.rule: align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: calc(100vh - 80px); padding-top: 118px; text-align: center;

classes.name: logo
classes.rule: display: grid; width: 38px; height: 38px; place-items: center; border: 1px solid var(--dx-border); border-radius: 10px; background: #080a0f; color: var(--dx-text); font-size: 22px;

classes.name: metric
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--dx-border); padding-top: 12px;

classes.name: metric-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 10px;

classes.name: motion-icon-rail
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; justify-content: center; margin-top: 28px;

classes.name: motion-progress-bar
classes.rule: display: block; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--dx-green), #f8ff8f); transition: width 260ms ease;

classes.name: motion-progress-track
classes.rule: position: relative; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; height: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--dx-border); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);

classes.name: motion-proof
classes.rule: transition: transform 260ms ease, border-color 260ms ease, background 260ms ease;

classes.name: motion-stage-card
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 4px; min-width: 0; border: 1px solid var(--dx-border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035); transition: border-color 220ms ease, transform 220ms ease, background 220ms ease;

classes.name: nav-links
classes.rule: gap: 4px; justify-content: flex-start; min-width: 0; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none;

classes.name: package-chip-grid
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin: 28px 0;

classes.name: platform-card
classes.rule: align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 7px; justify-content: center; min-height: 112px; overflow: hidden; padding: 14px 10px; position: relative; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease;

classes.name: platform-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 12px; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(112px, 1fr)); margin-top: 44px; width: 100%;

classes.name: platform-icon
classes.rule: color: var(--text); display: block; height: 28px; margin-bottom: 2px; object-fit: contain; width: 28px;

classes.name: primary-action
classes.rule: background: var(--button-primary-bg); border: 1px solid var(--button-primary-bg); color: var(--button-primary-text);

classes.name: proof-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 16px;

classes.name: proof-header
classes.rule: border: 1px solid #d7dae3; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; padding: 28px; box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(25, 26, 30, 0.08);

classes.name: query-box
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--dx-border); border-radius: 12px; margin: 14px 0; padding: 14px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035); color: #cbd5e1; font-size: 13px;

classes.name: rank-row
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin: 28px 0;

classes.name: route-card
classes.rule: border: 1px solid var(--dx-border); border-radius: 18px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.055), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025)); box-shadow: 0 22px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);

classes.name: route-nav
classes.rule: align-items: center; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin: 18px 0;

classes.name: route-shell
classes.rule: width: min(980px, calc(100vw - 32px)); margin: 0 auto; padding: 36px 0 72px;

classes.name: runtime-boundary
classes.rule: border: 1px solid #d7dae3; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; margin-top: 18px; padding: 24px;

classes.name: scene-canvas
classes.rule: width: 100%; min-height: 300px; border: 1px solid var(--dx-border); border-radius: 14px; background: #02040a;

classes.name: scene-controls
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; align-items: center;

classes.name: screen-card
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; min-height: 100%; overflow: hidden; padding: 28px; position: relative;

classes.name: screen-dock
classes.rule: align-items: center; display: flex; gap: 9px; justify-content: center; padding: 10px;

classes.name: screen-stack
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 18px; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(180px, 0.32fr); min-height: 330px;

classes.name: secondary-action
classes.rule: align-items: center; border-radius: 8px; display: inline-flex; gap: 10px; font-weight: 900; justify-content: center; min-width: 150px; padding: 13px 18px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease;

classes.name: signal-strip
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 16px; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); margin: 28px 0;

classes.name: site-nav
classes.rule: align-items: center; backdrop-filter: blur(20px); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--page-bg) 82%, transparent); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft); display: flex; gap: 18px; left: 50%; max-width: 1160px; padding: 10px; position: fixed; top: 16px; transform: translateX(-50%); width: calc(100% - 32px); z-index: 100;

classes.name: split-surface
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 24px; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));

classes.name: status-line
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 14px; color: var(--dx-muted); font-size: 13px;

classes.name: topbar
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; padding: 16px 0 36px;

classes.name: transition-colors
classes.rule: transition-property: color, background-color, border-color, text-decoration-color, fill, stroke; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s;

classes.name: video-carousel-track
classes.rule: animation: video-carousel-slide 24s cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1) infinite; display: flex; width: 300%;

classes.name: video-play-icon
classes.rule: align-items: center; background: var(--button-primary-bg); border: 1px solid var(--border-strong); border-radius: 999px; color: var(--button-primary-text); display: flex; height: clamp(58px, 8vw, 92px); justify-content: center; padding: clamp(16px, 2.4vw, 28px); position: relative; width: clamp(58px, 8vw, 92px); z-index: 1;

classes.name: video-preview-card
classes.rule: align-items: center; background: radial-gradient(circle at 24% 22%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--text) 18%, transparent), transparent 26%), radial-gradient(circle at 76% 34%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--text) 10%, transparent), transparent 30%), linear-gradient(135deg, var(--page-bg-alt), var(--card-bg-subtle)); color: var(--text); display: flex; height: 100%; justify-content: center; min-height: 100%; position: relative; text-decoration: none; width: 100%;

classes.name: video-slide
classes.rule: aspect-ratio: 16 / 7.8; background: var(--card-bg-subtle); flex: 0 0 33.3333%; margin: 0; overflow: hidden; position: relative;
